heading: Office of Environmental Quality Management Fund
label: 4375 Office of Environmental Quality Management Fund

children.heading: Establishment; financing of study contracts and Federal interagency environmental projects
children.label: a Establishment; financing of study contracts and Federal interagency environmental projects

children.text: study contracts that are jointly sponsored by the Office and one or more other Federal agencies; and
Federal interagency environmental projects (including task forces) in which the Office participates.

children.heading: Study contract or project initiative
children.label: b Study contract or project initiative
children.text: Any study contract or project that is to be financed under subsection (a) may be initiated only with the approval of the Director.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: c Regulations
children.text: The Director shall promulgate regulations setting forth policies and procedures for operation of the Fund.
